tool.name: Lix plugin API candidate C: pure copied checkpoint reducer
tool.install: included in the isolated Lix research workspace

task: Implement and test the assigned Text, CSV, JSON, or Markdown plugin task

config.prompt_template: Implement and test the {format} plugin task at {task_path} in {isolated_workspace} using {candidate_api_path}

overrides.temperature: Codex collaboration agents do not expose temperature; 0 records the requested nominal setting, not a verified provider setting
overrides.tools: Codex functions.exec and collaboration.send_message replaced the pinned Claude Code tool list; apply_patch and shell execution were nested under functions.exec
overrides.mcp_servers: Codex does not expose per-agent MCP stripping; no MCP calls were observed in the scored transcripts
overrides.system_prompt: Codex collaboration agents use the Codex system/developer instructions and cannot run with no system prompt
overrides.mode: Codex workspace-write sandbox policy replaced bypassPermissions
overrides.max_turns: Codex collaboration agents do not expose a hard turn cap; 40 records the requested nominal limit

agents.success_reason: Implemented the Candidate C text plugin in the assigned workspace; cargo fmt --check succeeded and cargo test passed all 9 tests, explicitly covering all seven required behaviors.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,260p' src/lib.rs && sed -n '1,200p' Cargo.toml && sed -n '1,200p' README.md && sed -n '1,320p' /private/tmp/lix-plugin-api-research.idNwOL/lix/experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/lib.rs

agents.success_reason: Implemented an executable CSV plugin against candidate_c in the assigned workspace; its three passing tests cover all eight required behaviors, and cargo test plus formatting/diff checks succeeded.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,240p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/tasks/csv.md && sed -n '1,280p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/candidate_c.rs && printf '\nRUN FILES\n' && rg --files experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1 | sort

agents.success_reason: Implemented the Candidate C JSON plugin in the assigned workspace, added tests covering all eight required behaviors, and independently reran cargo test successfully with 2 passed and 0 failed.
first_3_commands: sed -n '1,260p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1/src/lib.rs && sed -n '1,200p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/ax-eval/runs/final-active/agent-1/Cargo.toml && sed -n '1,320p' experiments/plugin-api-v2/api-candidates/src/lib.rs && rg -n "candidate_c|IdAllocator|EntitySource|struct Change|enum Change" experiments/plugin-api-v2 -g '*.rs'

agents.success_reason: Implemented the Markdown plugin in the assigned agent-1 workspace against Candidate C, added five tests covering all eight required behaviors, and successfully ran cargo fmt --check and cargo test with all 5 tests passing.
